"// Operation "Bird storm" \\"
January 1, 2024. 1:50 AM 


Twenty white vans parked near EHS (Extra-High Voltage Substations) and Fiber optic hubs.

 20 essential substations hit causing a coast to coast black out leading to confusion. Fiber optic hubs found cut or demolished. Backup generators run but communications are down. 

2:30 AM 

Police hotlines are down as the cell towers lose power, people step out onto the streets only to be met with gas of death, coughing, burning of the skin, screams echo out then silenced a few seconds later. Stadiums were not safe, gas spilled from the exits, security guards shot dead, 32346 people trapped, suffocating and burning to death. Painfully so. 

2:40 AM 

Bridges blown apart, subway tunnels collapse as planted explosives detonate crushing multiple trains while also disabling the subway tunnels. Police deploy onto the street but suffer from severe chemical burns, rescue begins. Hospitals begin flooding with people as hundreds to thousands of people rush to hospitals, with electricity cut it took longer for the injured to be taken in, leading to many deaths. Evacuation centers start flooding as people rush for safety. 

3:00 AM 

Norfolk VA ships, bombarded by several swarms of drones strapped with explosives, half of the fleet is damaged. And other ports, shipping vessels are sunk, cities themselves begin getting attacked by drones, the remaining police begins enforcing “Shelter in place” orders and sets up perimeter controls.

3:30 AM 

the white house is informed of the ongoing anarchy and tries to calm the public but fails Wide spread panic spreads across Washington D.C and half of America
